nasb.text: Then Laban said to Jacob, “What have you done by deceiving me and carrying away my daughters like captives of the sword?

esv.text: And Laban said to Jacob, “What have you done, that you have tricked me and driven away my daughters like captives of the sword?

cnv.text: 拉班對雅各說：“你作的是甚麼事呢？你瞞著我，把我的女兒們當作戰俘一樣帶走了。

ccb.text: 拉班对雅各说：“你做的是什么？你欺瞒我，把我的女儿像战俘一样带走。

csbs.text: 拉班对雅各说：“你做了什么呢？你欺瞒我，又把我的女儿们像刀剑下的俘虏那样带走。
